json_data.title: Concurrency Theory (e.g., using process calculi like CSP or CCS)
json_data.reason: It provides a foundational understanding of formal models for concurrent behavior, which is critical in OS design and verification.

json_data.title: Certified Compilers
json_data.reason: This topic applies advanced formal methods to verify the correctness of a crucial piece of system software, often using sophisticated proof assistants.

json_data.title: Formal Synthesis of Verified Systems
json_data.reason: This research-level topic explores automatically generating software systems that are correct by construction, extending verification to system design itself.
